title: Implement a use case over a port
scenario: A use case coordinates domain rules and ports. It should be generic over the port trait so infrastructure stays replaceable.
instructions: Implement register_user over UserRepository. Return DuplicateEmail if the email already exists; otherwise save the new user.

hints.body: Keep the Register user use case boundaries code active and implement register_user over UserRepository. Return DuplicateEmail if the email already exists; otherwise save the new user.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Implement a use case over a port is shown below.

completionExplanation: Implement a use case over a port now extends the active Register user use case boundaries code with register usecase function. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
